title: Record: 11L XSA11 + Legal Score-First AdamW TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1218)
body:
## Summary

11-layer GPT with XSA on all layers, legal score-first TTT using AdamW optimizer.

**3-seed results (seeds 1337, 42, 7):**

| Seed | Base BPB | TTT BPB | Artifact Size |
|------|----------|---------|---------------|
| 1337 | 1.1235 | **1.1212** | 15.88 MB |
| 42 | 1.1248 | **1.1222** | 15.82 MB |
| 7 | 1.1241 | **1.1219** | 15.54 MB |
| **Mean** | 1.1241 | **1.1218** | |
| **Std** | | 0.0005 | |

## Architecture
- 11 layers, model_dim=512, 8 heads / 4 KV heads (GQA)
- **XSA (Exclusive Self-Attention) on all 11 layers** (novel — others use last 4)
- Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale (1/sqrt(layer+1))
- SmearGate + OrthoInit, BigramHash 2048, Shared VE128
- Tight SWA (every 50 steps) + EMA 0.9985
- Muon optimizer (lr=0.025, WD=0.04)
- Flash Attention 3 (Hopper), 89ms/step, ~6737 steps in 600s
- int6 quantization + zstd-22, 2% magnitude pruning

## Legal Score-First TTT
Compliant with all organizer rulings on TTT (issues #67, #44, #152, #168):

1. Val data split into sequential 65536-token chunks
2. For each chunk: **score first** (sliding window stride=32, inference_mode)
3. Then **adapt** on already-scored tokens (AdamW lr=0.0001, 3 epochs)
4. Last chunk is never trained on
5. Every token is evaluated BEFORE any gradient update that uses it

TTT config: AdamW (lr=0.0001, wd=0.0), cosine LR across chunks, last 2 blocks + norms + lm_head unfrozen (4.7M / 27M params), manual grad all_reduce across ranks.

## Training
- 8xH100 SXM 80GB, 600s wallclock
- Data: fineweb10B_sp1024, 80 train shards
- Eval: sliding window stride=32 + score-first TTT, ~630s total

## Key Differences from Base (#374)
- XSA on all 11 layers (vs 4)
- Legal score-first TTT with AdamW (vs no TTT)
- 2% magnitude pruning for artifact size compliance
